    D

    DelaunayTriangulation - Class in model
    Represents a simplified Delaunay triangulation.

    DeliveryRequest - Class in model
    Represents a medical request for organ delivery.

    Creates a delivery request.
    distanceTo(Position) - Method in class model.Position
    Computes the Euclidean distance to another position.
    draw() - Method in class ui.MapCanvas
    Full redraw.
    Drone - Class in model
    Represents a drone

    Represents a drone base that contains drones
